calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Instructing Clerk To Enter Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-09-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

1 - Plaintiff Capital One, N.A.'s unopposed Motion For Order Instructing Clerk To Enter Default And Default Judgment, filed in April 2026, is DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.

(see word minutes for full details)

Counsel for the Plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
